title: Star Award
description: Recognized as the best employee during the training period, demonstrating exceptional learning ability, technical aptitude, and commitment to excellence from day one.

title: Cornerstone Award
description: Awarded for best performance in the project, delivering critical features ahead of schedule while maintaining the highest code quality standards across the team.

title: Pursuit of Knowledge Award
description: Honored for outstanding knowledge sharing initiatives, including conducting technical sessions, creating documentation, and mentoring peers on modern development practices.

title: On the Spot Award
description: Recognized for exceptional project delivery under tight deadlines, successfully shipping a company-wide town hall presentation on telecom domain modernization to 150+ employees.

title: Best IT Project Award
description: Won the best university project award for outstanding capstone work on scalable web application architecture, demonstrating innovation and technical excellence.

title: 50,000+ Daily API Requests
description: Architected and led delivery of a multi-module Spring Boot microservices platform serving 50,000+ daily API requests across hybrid SQL/NoSQL architectures at Kinesso – IPG.

title: 40+ Reusable UI Components
description: Built and maintained a production-grade design system with 40+ reusable UI components across Angular, React.js, and Next.js, supporting 6 internal products with framework-agnostic design tokens.

title: 1,000+ Tests & 80%+ Coverage
description: Established comprehensive test infrastructure spanning 1,000+ unit tests, 100+ integration tests, and controller-level tests, achieving 80+% code coverage across Java, Python, and UI codebases.

title: 94% Deployment Time Reduction
description: Built a complete CI/CD pipeline with Azure DevOps, multi-stage Docker builds, and infrastructure-as-code, reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 12 minutes — a 94% improvement.

title: 5+ Engineers Mentored
description: Mentored 5+ junior engineers in Angular, React.js, Next.js, Spring Boot, Python patterns, and Gen AI integration. 3 were promoted to mid-level within 18 months.

title: 100% User Adoption
description: Achieved 100% user adoption across construction, admin, and executive teams through collaborative UX design and progressive feature rollouts, eliminating resistance to digital transformation.

title: 10K+ Daily Users Platform
description: Led technical design reviews for 8+ feature modules establishing architectural patterns including abstract service layer, saga pattern, CQRS, and Gen AI service mesh for a platform serving 10K+ daily users.
